name: Islander Club
subtitle: Discover Islander Club, a Gulf-front condominium offering tennis, fitness, and classic beachfront amenities.
shortDescription: The Islander Club is a beachfront condo community with tennis, a fitness center, sauna, clubhouse, and a large pool along private beach frontage. Consider it if you want classic Gulf-front living with strong amenities.

name: Tangerine Bay Club
subtitle: Discover Tangerine Bay Club, a bayfront gated community offering clubhouse and marina amenities.
shortDescription: The Tangerine Bay Club is an exclusive gated community with clubhouse, fitness center, pool, and day docks. Great for those considering a social waterfront lifestyle.

name: Vizcaya
subtitle: Explore Vizcaya, a boutique beachfront community offering tennis and luxury living.
shortDescription: Vizcaya is a boutique Gulf-front community built around a resort-style pool setting, with Har-Tru tennis, a clubhouse with fitness center, and on-site management. It’s ideal for buyers who want a quieter luxury feel—more “private resort residence” than high-rise tower—while staying right on the beach.

name: Grand Bay (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Explore Grand Bay, a luxury Bay Isles tower offering resort-style amenities and private beach club access.
shortDescription: Grand Bay is essentially a luxury tower experience featuring pools, tennis, clubhouse facilities, and gated privacy. It's a high-end residence with resort-style amenities.

name: Marina Bay (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Explore Marina Bay, a Bay Isles condominium offering marina access and beach club privileges.
shortDescription: Marina Bay is a bayfront condominium within Bay Isles featuring private boat slips, a heated pool, gated entry, and access to the Bay Isles Beach Club. It’s ideal for buyers seeking a marina lifestyle with added private beach privileges.

name: Lands End
subtitle: Experience Lands End, a gated north-end enclave offering tennis, pickleball, a heated pool, and shared dockage.
shortDescription: Lands End is a small gated enclave offering Har-Tru tennis, pickleball, a heated pool, and shared dockage. It’s ideal for buyers who want privacy with an active waterfront lifestyle.

name: Harbour Circle (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Explore Harbour Circle, a maintenance-free Bay Isles villa community offering golf-course views and a community pool and spa.
shortDescription: Harbour Circle is a maintenance-free Bay Isles villa neighborhood (42 homes) with a community pool and spa and a highly visible setting along the Longboat Key Club Harbourside golf corridor. It’s a great fit for buyers who want the “lock-and-leave” ease of a villa community while still living inside gated Bay Isles.

name: Silver Sands
subtitle: Discover Silver Sands, a beachfront resort-style community offering vacation-friendly amenities.
shortDescription: Silver Sands stands out as a pure beachfront resort-style property with pool amenities and easy Gulf access. Consider it if you want a simple vacation-friendly condo setting.

name: Beachplace
subtitle: Discover Beachplace, a resort-style beachfront community offering expansive grounds and a wide array of recreational amenities.
shortDescription: Beachplace is a large, resort-style beachfront community with private beach access, community pools, fitness center, and tennis amenities set across expansive grounds. Consider it if you want a vacation-style atmosphere with abundant outdoor space.

name: Lighthouse Point
subtitle: Explore Lighthouse Point, an exclusive south-end neighborhood offering deep-water docks and luxury waterfront estates.
shortDescription: Lighthouse Point is an exclusive gated neighborhood at the south end of Longboat Key featuring deep-water docks and estate-style homes. It’s a top choice for buyers seeking luxury waterfront privacy near St. Armands.

name: Longboat Arms
subtitle: Experience Longboat Arms, a bayfront community offering boat slips and waterfront living.
shortDescription: Longboat Arms is a bayfront condominium community offering boat slips, a heated pool, fishing pier, clubhouse, and outdoor recreation areas. Its boating amenities and nearby beach access create a relaxed waterfront lifestyle.

name: Bayou Hammock
subtitle: Experience Bayou Hammock, an ultra-private gated enclave on Longboat Key known for estate-sized lots and a tranquil bayou waterfront setting.
shortDescription: Bayou Hammock is a gated, ultra-low-density enclave known for some of the largest residential lots on Longboat Key and a quiet, old-Florida canopy-road setting. It’s one to consider if you want rare privacy and estate-scale waterfront potential rather than “community amenity” living.

name: Country Club Shores
subtitle: Experience Country Club Shores, a premier canal-front community on south Longboat Key offering private docks and deeded beach access.
shortDescription: Country Club Shores is a classic, highly sought-after south-end neighborhood known for canal-front homes with private docks and an “Old Florida” waterfront layout. Buyers love it for the combination of boating convenience and deeded beach access, plus quick proximity to St. Armands and Sarasota.

name: The Residences at The St. Regis
subtitle: Discover The Residences at The St. Regis, an ultra-luxury resort residence offering five-star services.
shortDescription: The Residences at The St. Regis Longboat Key are positioned as a guard-gated, ultra-luxury resort-residence experience with multiple pools, spa and fitness, and chef-driven dining, plus curated owner-only amenities like a residents’ lounge and private pool/sun deck. This is the pick for buyers who want five-star service, new-build prestige, and a true “destination resort at home” lifestyle.

name: Seaplace
subtitle: Explore Seaplace, a guard-gated beachfront community offering extensive recreational amenities.
shortDescription: Seaplace is a guard-gated private beachfront community with multiple pools, tennis, fitness center, clubhouse, and walking paths.

name: Sage Longboat Key
subtitle: Explore Sage Longboat Key, a boutique luxury enclave offering wellness amenities and beachfront exclusivity.
shortDescription: Sage Longboat Key is a modern, ultra-boutique beachfront enclave built around wellness, with an Olympic-style lap pool, private cabanas, fire-pit lounges, a high-end fitness/wellness center, concierge service, and gated security. It’s a high-end “private resort at home” pick for buyers who want new(er) construction and a curated luxury lifestyle.

name: Harbour Court (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Discover Harbour Court, an intimate Bay Isles enclave where every home includes a private dock with direct bay access.
shortDescription: Harbour Court is a boutique Bay Isles enclave of 18 homes where each residence includes a dock on the Bay Isles waterway with direct access out to Sarasota Bay. It’s a standout for buyers who want a rare “private home + built-in boating” setup behind the gates, without the scale of a large neighborhood.

name: Westchester
subtitle: Discover Westchester, a residential condominium offering pool amenities and relaxed living.
shortDescription: Westchester is a residential condo community with two heated pools, a clubhouse, and on-site management that supports an easy, low-maintenance lifestyle. It’s a great fit for buyers who want a relaxed community feel and strong everyday amenities without paying for a massive resort-style tower environment.

name: Beach Harbor Club
subtitle: Explore Beach Harbor Club, a bayside community offering marina access, social amenities, and a boating-friendly lifestyle.
shortDescription: Beach Harbor Club is a bayside community featuring a heated pool, clubhouse, fitness room, boat slips, fishing pier, and social activity spaces. Its marina amenities and community atmosphere make it attractive to buyers who prioritize boating and social waterfront living.

name: Dream Island
subtitle: Explore Dream Island, a north-end boating neighborhood known for deep-water canals and spacious waterfront homesites.
shortDescription: Dream Island is a north Longboat Key boating neighborhood known for deep-water canals, larger lots, and a quiet residential feel that dates back decades. It’s a strong choice for buyers who prioritize waterfront dockage and “neighborhood privacy” over clubhouse-style amenities.

name: Longboat Key Club
subtitle: Discover Longboat Key Club, a master-planned luxury resort community offering championship golf, tennis gardens, spa services, marina access, and private beach club amenities.
shortDescription: Longboat Key Club is a master-planned resort and residential community offering golf, tennis, spa, dining, marina, and private beach club amenities. It delivers a full luxury resort lifestyle tied to multiple condominium residences within the gated campus.

name: Sleepy Lagoon
subtitle: Discover Sleepy Lagoon, a large north-end neighborhood offering canal homes and a laid-back island lifestyle.
shortDescription: Sleepy Lagoon is a large north-end neighborhood spanning both sides of Gulf of Mexico Drive with a mix of canal and inland homes. It’s attractive for buyers seeking neighborhood scale and Longboat lifestyle value.

name: Aria
subtitle: Experience Aria, a modern luxury beachfront enclave offering contemporary residences and panoramic Gulf views.
shortDescription: Aria is a newer ultra-luxury Gulf-front enclave known for contemporary architecture and expansive water views. Consider it if you want modern design, privacy, and a high-end beachfront living experience.

name: Casa Del Mar
subtitle: Discover Casa Del Mar, a beachfront condominium offering tennis, pool amenities, and a vacation-style atmosphere.
shortDescription: Casa Del Mar is a beachfront condominium community offering direct beach access, a resort pool, tennis courts, and lounge seating along the Gulf. It’s well suited for buyers wanting a casual, resort-style setting with strong vacation and seasonal appeal.

name: Longboat Terrace
subtitle: Explore Longboat Terrace, a small townhouse-style condo community on north Longboat Key near the Gulf.
shortDescription: Longboat Terrace is a north-end Longboat Key condo community known for townhouse-style units and a smaller-scale setting. It’s a good option for buyers who want a more residential floor-plan feel than a typical condo layout.

name: The Beach on Longboat Key
subtitle: Explore The Beach on Longboat Key, a beachfront condominium offering resort-style living.
shortDescription: The Beach on Longboat Key is a Gulf-front resort-style condo/hotel setup with on-site amenities like a heated Gulf-front pool, private beach access, and a BBQ/grilling area. It’s ideal if you want true beachfront with a “lock-and-leave” vibe that feels more like a boutique resort stay.

name: Conrad Beach
subtitle: Explore Conrad Beach, a boutique north-end community offering maintenance-free living near some of Longboat Key’s quietest beaches.
shortDescription: Conrad Beach is a boutique north-end enclave offering maintenance-free living with shared community amenities like a neighborhood pool. It’s a great fit for buyers who want a “single-family feel” near quiet beaches without the upkeep burden of a large lot or big association.

name: Players Club
subtitle: Explore Players Club, a Gulf-front tower offering resort-style amenities and expansive beach views.
shortDescription: Players Club is a Gulf-front condominium community featuring private beach access, heated pool with cabanas, tennis courts, fitness center, and clubhouse amenities with 24-hour security. It delivers an upscale resort-tower experience with expansive Gulf views.

name: Arbomar
subtitle: Explore Arbomar, a boutique Gulf-front community offering private beach access and a relaxed coastal living experience.
shortDescription: Arbomar is a boutique Gulf-front building offering direct beach access, a heated beachfront pool, fitness center, clubhouse, grilling areas, and secured entry. It’s an intimate beachfront setting ideal for buyers who want quiet coastal living with classic resort touches.

name: Harbour Oaks (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Explore Harbour Oaks, a Bay Isles villa community offering a pool, spa, and an active social atmosphere within the gates.
shortDescription: Harbour Oaks is a Bay Isles villa neighborhood featuring a community pool and spa plus an active social atmosphere. It’s appealing for buyers who want gated convenience and neighborly amenities without a high-rise environment.

name: Bay Harbour
subtitle: Explore Bay Harbour, a bayfront condominium community offering marina access and scenic Sarasota Bay views.
shortDescription: Bay Harbour is a bayfront condominium community known for private marina access, boat slips, a waterfront pool, and social gathering spaces overlooking Sarasota Bay. It’s a strong fit for boating enthusiasts seeking a residential, marina-focused lifestyle on south Longboat Key.

name: Buttonwood Harbor
subtitle: Explore Buttonwood Harbor, a small Longboat Key waterfront neighborhood known for its hidden-gem feel and limited home count.
shortDescription: Buttonwood Harbor is a small Longboat Key waterfront neighborhood with a hidden-gem reputation and limited inventory. It appeals to buyers seeking a quieter residential setting and who are comfortable making property-specific comparisons within a very small community.

name: Villa di Lancia
subtitle: Discover Villa di Lancia, a Gulf-front condominium offering tennis and resort-style amenities.
shortDescription: Villa di Lancia is a Gulf-front community with a resort-style clubhouse (fitness + sauna), a pool and hot tub, and two Har-Tru tennis courts that also accommodate pickleball. It’s a strong pick for buyers who want a true “beach + racquet sports” lifestyle in a well-amenitized, established Longboat Key community.Villa di Lancia is a Gulf-front community with a resort-style clubhouse (fitness + sauna), a pool and hot tub, and two Har-Tru tennis courts that also accommodate pickleball. It’s a strong pick for buyers who want a true “beach + racquet sports” lifestyle in a well-amenitized, established Longboat Key community.

name: Sea Grape Inn
subtitle: Explore Sea Grape Inn, an eight-unit beachfront boutique condo-resort on Longboat Key with direct Gulf frontage.
shortDescription: Sea Grape Inn is an eight-unit beachfront boutique condo-resort located directly on the Gulf of Mexico in Longboat Key. It appeals to buyers seeking low-density beachfront ownership with a small-property feel rather than a large resort complex.

name: Islands West
subtitle: Explore Islands West, a beachfront high-rise offering tennis, fitness, and panoramic Gulf views.
shortDescription: Islands West is a Gulf-front high-rise featuring private beach access, a heated beachfront pool, fitness center, sauna, tennis, and social spaces. It offers a traditional beachfront tower lifestyle with strong core amenities.

name: Beach Castle
subtitle: Discover Beach Castle, a Gulf-front condominium offering direct beach access and a laid-back coastal retreat setting.
shortDescription: Beach Castle is a beachfront condominium community offering private beach access, a heated pool, and vacation-style rental flexibility in a laid-back Gulf setting. It’s best suited for buyers seeking a casual coastal retreat with income potential and direct sand access.

name: Jewfish Key
subtitle: Explore Jewfish Key, a boat-access-only island near Longboat Key that offers extreme privacy, waterfront living, and a true off-grid-style island feel.
shortDescription: Jewfish Key is a boat-access-only island area near Longboat Key known for exceptional privacy and a highly unique waterfront ownership experience. It’s best suited for buyers who want a true island retreat and are prepared for the logistics of boat-based access and property maintenance.

name: Sunset Beach
subtitle: Explore Sunset Beach, a Gulf-front condominium offering gated privacy and beachfront living.
shortDescription: Sunset Beach is a gated, Gulf-front community centered around a heated pool and spa/hot tub, with under-building/assigned parking that keeps the day-to-day easy. It’s a strong choice for buyers who want secure, no-fuss beachfront living in a more intimate complex.

name: Longboat Key Estates
subtitle: Experience Longboat Key Estates, a quiet residential community offering boating access and a relaxed island lifestyle.
shortDescription: Longboat Key Estates is a quiet residential neighborhood with a strong boating orientation and relaxed island setting. It’s ideal for buyers who want privacy and everyday livability on the Key.

name: Neptune
subtitle: Explore Neptune, a boutique Gulf-front Longboat Key condo building with direct beach access and a small-owner feel.
shortDescription: Neptune is a boutique Gulf-front condo building on Longboat Key with direct beach access and a low-density ownership feel. It’s ideal for buyers who value beachfront location and simplicity over a large-scale condo campus.

name: Sands Point
subtitle: Discover Sands Point, a Gulf-front community offering secluded beach access and waterfront amenities.
shortDescription: Sands Point is a Gulf-front community with a heated pool and spa, a walkway to a more secluded stretch of beach, and waterside extras like a fishing pier (with limited/optional docks referenced in community summaries). It’s compelling for buyers who want “quiet beach + boating proximity” without the feel of a massive resort tower.

name: Infinity
subtitle: Explore Infinity, a boutique bayfront luxury tower offering private marina access and upscale amenities.
shortDescription: Infinity is a boutique bayfront luxury tower featuring private boat slips, a heated pool and spa, fitness center, secure entry, and under-building parking. Its limited residences and upscale finishes create an exclusive waterfront living experience.

name: Buttonwood Cove
subtitle: Explore Buttonwood Cove, a Gulf-to-Bay community offering boating access, beach privileges, and recreational facilities.
shortDescription: Buttonwood Cove is a Gulf-to-Bay community offering private beach access, boat docks, kayak launch, tennis/pickleball courts, a clubhouse, and a heated bayside pool. Its dual-waterfront lifestyle makes it especially appealing for buyers who want both boating access and laid-back beach living.

name: Seascape
subtitle: Experience Seascape, a boutique Gulf-front condominium offering quiet beachfront living.
shortDescription: Seascape is a small, quiet Gulf-front condo community with direct beach access plus straightforward essentials like a heated pool and elevator service. It’s a great fit if you want “low-drama” beachfront living in a more intimate setting.

name: La Playa
subtitle: Explore La Playa, a Gulf-front condominium offering direct beach access and relaxed resort appeal.
shortDescription: La Playa is a Gulf-front condominium community featuring private beach access, a heated beachfront pool, and outdoor grilling areas. It’s a relaxed beachfront setting suited for buyers seeking casual coastal living.

name: Sea Oats
subtitle: Experience Sea Oats, a small Gulf-front property offering privacy and direct beach access.
shortDescription: Sea Oats appears to be a tiny, low-density building (8 units) on Gulf of Mexico Drive that’s marketed in rental/listing materials as Gulf-front with walk-out beach access, but with a more “simple basics” amenity profile than the larger towers. It’s one to consider if the priority is privacy and beachfront location over resort-style facilities.

name: Sand Cay Beach Resort
subtitle: Experience Sand Cay Beach Resort, a beachfront condominium offering tennis and vacation-style living.
shortDescription: Sand Cay Beach Resort is a beachfront condo-resort with classic vacation amenities like a heated pool, tennis, shuffleboard, and outdoor BBQ/picnic space steps from the sand. It’s a strong fit for buyers who want simple Gulf-front living with an “easy rental-friendly resort” vibe.

name: Beachcomber
subtitle: Experience Beachcomber, a Gulf-front condominium offering walk-out beach access and classic Longboat Key charm.
shortDescription: Beachcomber is a direct Gulf-front condominium known for private beach access, a beachfront pool, and relaxed low-rise living along the shoreline. It’s a classic Longboat Key beachfront option for buyers seeking simplicity, views, and walk-out beach proximity.

name: Banyan Bay Club
subtitle: Discover the Banyan Bay Club, a Gulf-to-Bay community offering beach access, boating amenities, and an active waterfront lifestyle.
shortDescription: The Banyan Bay Club is a unique Gulf-to-Bay community featuring a clubhouse, pool, fitness center, tennis and pickleball courts, kayak storage, and bayside dockage with boat access. Its rare dual-waterfront layout makes it appealing for buyers who want both beach relaxation and boating lifestyle amenities.

name: Emerald Harbor
subtitle: Discover Emerald Harbor, a canal-front community offering direct Intracoastal boating access and established island living.
shortDescription: Emerald Harbor is a north-end boating community built around wide, deep-water canals with access out toward the Intracoastal Waterway. It’s ideal for buyers who want true dock-and-go capability in an established, single-family neighborhood setting.

name: Cabana Beach Club
subtitle: Experience Cabana Beach Club, a boutique Gulf-front property offering private beach access and relaxed resort living.
shortDescription: Cabana Beach Club is a Gulf-front condominium community featuring private beach access, a heated pool, and outdoor grilling areas in an intimate low-rise setting. Its relaxed beachfront atmosphere makes it a strong fit for buyers seeking a quiet coastal retreat with classic Old Florida charm.

name: Grand Mariner
subtitle: Experience Grand Mariner, a bayfront condominium offering marina access and sweeping Sarasota Bay views.
shortDescription: Grand Mariner is a bayfront condominium community featuring private boat slips, a heated waterfront pool, secure entry, and under-building parking along Sarasota Bay. It’s especially appealing to boating enthusiasts seeking a marina-focused lifestyle with expansive water views.

name: Tiffany Plaza
subtitle: Discover Tiffany Plaza, a boutique beachfront building offering private beach access.
shortDescription: Tiffany Plaza is a smaller Gulf-front building with a heated pool, clubhouse/meeting space, sauna, grilling area, and a private beach walkway (plus handy extras like storage/tiki hut beach storage noted by local listing sources). It’s appealing for buyers who want intimate beachfront living with the core amenities done right.

name: Longboat Shores
subtitle: Explore Longboat Shores, a canal-front neighborhood offering deep-water dockage and classic waterfront living.
shortDescription: Longboat Shores is a canal-front neighborhood of roughly 50+ homes with docks and deep-water access to Sarasota Bay and beyond. It’s a great fit for buyers prioritizing boating function over shared amenities.

name: Seahorse Beach Resort
subtitle: Discover Seahorse Beach Resort, a beachfront condominium offering a pool and resort-style accommodations.
shortDescription: Seahorse Beach Resort is a Gulf-front condo-resort with a heated pool overlooking the beach and a classic “walk-out private beach” setup geared toward easy stays and repeat visits. It’s a solid option for buyers who want a straightforward beachfront retreat with on-site operations and a proven vacation-resort feel.

name: The Bayou (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Explore The Bayou, a Bay Isles single-family neighborhood offering waterfront, golf, and garden homesites behind the gates.
shortDescription: The Bayou is a Bay Isles single-family neighborhood with homes along the Bay Isles Waterway as well as golf and garden lots. It’s appealing for buyers seeking custom-home living within the gates.

name: Laguna Yacht Village
subtitle: Discover Laguna Yacht Village, a boutique gated boating community offering bay access and a private residential setting.
shortDescription: Laguna Yacht Village is a boutique gated boating community with HOA-maintained grounds and a shared pool environment. It’s compelling for buyers seeking beach and bay proximity within a very private neighborhood footprint.

name: Windward Bay
subtitle: Experience Windward Bay, a Gulf-to-Bay community offering boating access and beach privileges.
shortDescription: Windward Bay is a Gulf-to-Bay community with deeded beach access across the street, two pools, a fitness center with sauna, tennis and pickleball, clubhouse spaces, and helpful extras like kayak storage and walking trails. It’s an excellent choice for buyers who want “boating + beach” flexibility in one place, with a deep amenity bench and a residential (not resort-hotel) feel.

name: Portobello
subtitle: Experience Portobello, a boutique Gulf-front condominium offering beach access and a quiet coastal setting.
shortDescription: Portobello is a mid-Key Gulf-front condominium featuring private beach access, a heated pool, tennis courts, clubhouse amenities, and elevator access. Its boutique scale and direct beachfront setting make it appealing for buyers seeking a quieter, traditional Longboat Key beach lifestyle.

name: Sea Pines
subtitle: Explore Sea Pines, a north-end beachfront condo community with a low-rise layout and direct Gulf-side living.
shortDescription: Sea Pines is a north-end Longboat Key beachfront condo community with a low-rise, lower-density feel. It’s a good fit for buyers who want direct Gulf access and a quieter alternative to larger condo towers.

name: Longboat Harbour Towers
subtitle: Experience Longboat Harbour Towers, a beachfront condominium offering recreational amenities and Gulf living.
shortDescription: Longboat Harbour Towers is a Gulf-front condominium community featuring beachfront access, a heated pool, tennis courts, shuffleboard, fitness facilities, and on-site management. It offers a traditional beachfront living experience with a mix of recreational and coastal lifestyle amenities.

name: Longboat Landing
subtitle: Discover Longboat Landing - a nine-unit bayfront condo community on north Longboat Key with beach access and a boutique feel.
shortDescription: Longboat Landing is a small bayfront Longboat Key condo community with only nine units and a quiet north-end setting. It stands out for buyers who want a boutique condominium with beach access and a less crowded feel.

name: Sutton Place
subtitle: Experience Sutton Place, a bayside community offering beach access and boating amenities.
shortDescription: Sutton Place is a bayside community with deeded private beach access, two pools, a clubhouse, fishing pier, and boat slips. Great for combining boating with beach access.

name: Bayview Estates
subtitle: Explore Bayview Estates, a Longboat Key waterfront neighborhood with a mix of older island homes, renovations, and newer custom builds.
shortDescription: Bayview Estates is a Longboat Key waterfront neighborhood with a mix of older island homes, updated residences, and newer builds. It’s a good fit for buyers who want single-family living and are comfortable comparing homes individually for condition, water access, and renovation level.

name: Sea Gate Club
subtitle: Explore Sea Gate Club, a beachfront condominium offering tennis, fitness, and social amenities.
shortDescription: Sea Gate Club is a beachfront community offering a heated Gulf-front pool, Har-Tru tennis, a fitness center, and strong common spaces like a social room/kitchen and library, plus on-site management and covered parking/storage. It’s a great choice for buyers who want a true “resort-amenity checklist” in a walkable mid-Key location.

name: Longboat Harbour
subtitle: Explore Longboat Harbour, a bayside community offering boating amenities and private beach club access.
shortDescription: Longboat Harbour is a large bayside community offering four pools, tennis courts, fitness center, clubhouse spaces, boat slips, kayak storage, and gated entry with private Gulf beach club access. It’s one of the most amenity-rich boating communities on Longboat Key.

name: Emerald Pointe (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Experience Emerald Pointe, a private Bay Isles enclave offering gated living and exclusive access to the Bay Isles Beach Club.
shortDescription: Emerald Pointe is a private Bay Isles enclave (North & South) positioned for buyers who want a smaller, quieter neighborhood inside a gated master community. As part of Bay Isles, residents have access to the private Bay Isles Beach Club, adding a true “beach club lifestyle” layer to the neighborhood.

name: Promenade
subtitle: Experience Promenade, a luxury Gulf-front tower offering concierge services and resort-style amenities.
shortDescription: Promenade is a Gulf-front luxury tower featuring private beach access, heated pool and spa, tennis courts, fitness center, concierge services, and social gathering spaces. It delivers a full-service high-rise lifestyle with strong resort-style amenities.

name: Longbeach Village
subtitle: Discover Longbeach Village, a historic north Longboat Key neighborhood offering Old Florida charm and walkable coastal living.
shortDescription: Longbeach Village is a historic north-end neighborhood known for Old Florida cottages, walkability, and waterfront charm. It’s perfect for buyers seeking character and culture over structured HOA amenities.

name: Harbour Villa Club
subtitle: Discover Harbour Villa Club, a bayside community offering boat slips and a relaxed waterfront lifestyle.
shortDescription: Harbour Villa Club is a bayside condominium community offering a private marina with boat slips, heated pool, fishing pier, and clubhouse amenities. It’s a strong fit for buyers seeking a boating-oriented lifestyle in a smaller residential setting.

name: La Firenza
subtitle: Discover La Firenza, an exclusive beachfront enclave offering boutique luxury and private coastal living.
shortDescription: La Firenza is an ultra-luxury Gulf-front boutique building offering private beach access, resort pool and spa amenities, fitness facilities, concierge services, and secure parking. It delivers a highly exclusive beachfront living experience.

name: Bay Isles - Harbor Section
subtitle: Discover the Harbor Section in Bay Isles - a gated south Longboat Key neighborhood offering private beach club access and a prestigious residential setting.
shortDescription: The Bay Isles Harbor Section is a gated, prestige neighborhood inside larger Bay Isles, positioned for buyers who want a secure, private community feel on the south end of Longboat Key. A key lifestyle perk is Bay Isles ownership, which includes access to the private Bay Isles Beach Club on the Gulf.

name: Whitney Beach
subtitle: Explore Whitney Beach, a coastal community offering recreational amenities and private beach access.
shortDescription: Whitney Beach is an amenity-rich, beach-oriented community offering tennis/pickleball, shuffleboard, a resort-style heated pool, BBQ/picnic areas, and kayak launching—plus private beach access through the Whitney Beach Conservancy. It’s a standout for buyers who want an active, outdoorsy Longboat lifestyle with a uniquely protected, private-beach feel.

name: Northgate
subtitle: Explore Northgate, a tiny north-end Longboat Key condo community with only nine units near the beach.
shortDescription: Northgate is a boutique Longboat Key condo community with only nine units, making it one of the more limited-inventory options on the island. It appeals to buyers who want a quieter, smaller-scale building and north-end location.

name: The Shore
subtitle: Experience The Shore, a Gulf-front condominium offering classic beachfront amenities.
shortDescription: The Shore is a Gulf-front community with a classic “beach club” feel—heated beachfront pool and spa, clubhouse/social spaces (often including library/social room), fitness room, sauna, and convenient private/covered parking. It’s worth a look if you want direct beach access with solid amenities, without the scale of a large high-rise.

name: Aquarius Club
subtitle: Discover the Aquarius Club, an intimate Gulf-front condominium offering resort-style amenities and a private beachfront lifestyle.
shortDescription: The Aquarius Club is an intimate, Gulf-front building with resort-style features like a heated pool, tennis/pickleball, a fitness center, and updated common spaces. It's exclusive beachfront is also stunning.

name: Weston Pointe (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Discover Weston Pointe, a small Bay Isles enclave offering gated living near shopping, tennis, and marina amenities.
shortDescription: Weston Pointe is a small Bay Isles enclave positioned near shopping, the library, tennis facilities, and the Moorings marina. It’s ideal for buyers who want gated living with exceptional day-to-day convenience.

name: Veinte
subtitle: Experience Veinte, an exclusive beachfront community offering boutique luxury living.
shortDescription: Veinte is an exclusive Gulf-front community known for being small and private, with direct beach access plus amenities like a Gulf-facing pool and on-site fitness; listing sources also note a tennis/pickleball court and gated/secure entry. It’s best for buyers who want “few neighbors, big water views,” and a quieter luxury footprint.

name: Harbour Links (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Experience Harbour Links, a low-density Bay Isles neighborhood offering golf-course views and spacious residences with garages.
shortDescription: Harbour Links is a small Bay Isles enclave known for spacious residences with garages and golf-course views within a gated setting. It’s a strong pick for buyers seeking low-density Bay Isles living with an upscale residential feel.

name: Sabal Cove (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Explore Sabal Cove, a custom-home Bay Isles neighborhood offering quiet gated living in a curated residential setting.
shortDescription: Sabal Cove is a Bay Isles single-family enclave featuring custom-built homes within a quiet gated environment. It’s ideal for buyers wanting newer-style Bay Isles living in a curated residential setting.

name: Turtle Crawl Inn
subtitle: Explore Turtle Crawl Inn, a Gulf-front condominium offering resort-style accommodations.
shortDescription: Turtle Crawl Inn is a Gulf-front, resort-style condo property with a heated pool, beach access, and “easy vacation living” perks like grills/BBQ areas and tropical grounds (frequently highlighted by guest-facing materials). It’s a strong match for buyers who want a casual, stay-and-play beachfront setup rather than a formal luxury tower.

name: Hideaway Bay
subtitle: Explore Hideaway Bay, a secluded peninsula neighborhood on Longboat Key known for deep-water dockage and no-bridge bay access.
shortDescription: Hideaway Bay is a secluded Longboat Key waterfront neighborhood on Millar Bay with strong appeal for boating-focused buyers. It stands out for its deep-water dockage profile and no-bridge access, combined with a private cul-de-sac setting.

name: Queens Harbour (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Discover Queens Harbour, a gated Bay Isles neighborhood offering select boating access and golf or lakefront homesites.
shortDescription: Queens Harbour is a Bay Isles neighborhood where select homes feature boat docks on navigable water, with others oriented to golf or lake views. It’s appealing for buyers seeking gated prestige with optional boating access.

name: Club Longboat
subtitle: Explore Club Longboat, a beachfront community offering extensive tennis facilities and resort-style amenities.
shortDescription: Club Longboat is a beachfront condominium community at 5055 Gulf of Mexico Drive featuring 8 Har-Tru tennis courts, two heated pools, a Jacuzzi, sauna/spa features, a fitness center, and a clubhouse with social spaces. It’s a true “beach + tennis resort” lifestyle for buyers who want an amenity-rich community without confusing it with the separate Longboat Key Club resort brand.

name: Spanish Main Yacht Club (55+)
subtitle: Experience the Spanish Main Yacht Club, a 55+ boating community offering clubhouse living, docks, and beach access.
shortDescription: The Spanish Main Yacht Club is a 55+ community offering a clubhouse, pool, boating slips, and beach access. It’s a strong option for buyers seeking social, maintenance-friendly living with boating perks.

name: En Provence
subtitle: Experience En Provence, an ultra-luxury Gulf-front enclave offering privacy and high-end beachfront living.
shortDescription: En Provence is an ultra-luxury Gulf-front enclave offering private beach access, a resort pool and spa, fitness center, and concierge-style services within a gated setting. It delivers a boutique tower experience for buyers seeking privacy and high-end beachfront living.

name: Cedars West
subtitle: Discover Cedars West, a bayfront residential community connected to resort tennis and recreational amenities.
shortDescription: Cedars West is a bayfront residential enclave connected to the Cedars Tennis Resort, with access to tennis facilities, pool amenities, and fitness spaces. It appeals to buyers who want racquet sports and waterfront living combined in a quieter residential setting.

name: Castillian
subtitle: Explore Castillian, a Gulf-front tower offering tennis, pool amenities, and traditional beachfront living.
shortDescription: The Castillian is a Gulf-front condo community offering a heated pool and spa, tennis, clubhouse/game room with kitchen, BBQ/picnic pavilion, elevators, secure entry, under-building parking, storage, and kayak storage racks. It’s a classic beachfront building for buyers who want strong “core amenities” and a straightforward Longboat Key beach lifestyle. The Castillian is a Gulf-front condo community offering a heated pool and spa, tennis, clubhouse/game room with kitchen, BBQ/picnic pavilion, elevators, secure entry, under-building parking, storage, and kayak storage racks. It’s a classic beachfront building for buyers who want strong “core amenities” and a straightforward Longboat Key beach lifestyle.

name: Positano
subtitle: Discover Positano, a luxury beachfront enclave offering gated living and upscale amenities.
shortDescription: Positano is a luxury Gulf-front condominium enclave featuring direct beach access, a heated pool, fitness center, clubhouse and recreation facilities, gated security, and private garages. Its low-density design and modern construction create an exclusive beachfront lifestyle for high-end buyers.

name: Longboat Beach House
subtitle: Discover Longboat Beach House, a Gulf-front condominium offering beach access and vacation-style living.
shortDescription: Longboat Beach House is a Gulf-front condominium community featuring private beach access, a heated pool, and outdoor grilling spaces. It’s a laid-back beachfront option with strong vacation appeal.

name: Cedars East
subtitle: Experience Cedars East, a tennis-resort community offering racquet sports, pool amenities, and an active lifestyle setting.
shortDescription: Cedars East is located within the Cedars Tennis Resort, offering access to Har-Tru tennis courts, a Junior Olympic pool, fitness facilities, and clubhouse amenities. It’s ideal for buyers seeking an active, tennis-centric lifestyle in a resort-style setting.

name: Winding Oaks (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Experience Winding Oaks, a Bay Isles community offering lush surroundings, walking trails, and a private residential feel.
shortDescription: Winding Oaks is a Bay Isles community featuring a pool, private park, and walking trails within a lush residential setting. It’s a great fit for buyers who want gated privacy with nature-oriented surroundings.

name: The Grande at Longboat Key
subtitle: Explore The Grande at Longboat Key, an ultra-low-density Gulf-front condominium with only eight residences and expansive wraparound terraces.
shortDescription: The Grande at Longboat Key is a Gulf-front luxury condo community with just eight residences, giving it a private, low-density feel. It’s a strong fit for buyers seeking larger floor plans, direct beach access, and a more exclusive ownership experience.

name: Water Club
subtitle: Experience Water Club, a luxury beachfront tower offering concierge services and club amenities.
shortDescription: The Water Club is a luxurious gated condominium complex with concierge services, a fitness center, a spa, tennis courts, and resort-style pool amenities. It's a private club-style living experience.

name: Bayport Beach & Tennis
subtitle: Experience Bayport Beach & Tennis, a sprawling Gulf-to-Bay community offering beach access, tennis, and resort-style amenities.
shortDescription: Bayport Beach & Tennis is a sprawling Gulf-to-Bay community with private beach access, multiple pools, Har-Tru tennis courts, a fitness center, clubhouse, and fishing pier. Its expansive grounds and amenity depth create an active, resort-style environment with a low-density residential feel.

name: Pelican Harbour & Beach Club
subtitle: Experience Pelican Harbour & Beach Club, a waterfront community offering boating and beach access.
shortDescription: Pelican Harbour & Beach Club is a waterfront community offering marina access, heated pool, tennis, fitness facilities, and clubhouse amenities. Its boating access combined with beach privileges creates a balanced Gulf-to-Bay lifestyle.

name: Fairway Bay (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Discover Fairway Bay, a Bay Isles condominium community offering tennis, clubhouse amenities, and gated living.
shortDescription: Fairway Bay  (part of the larger Bay Isles community) offers tennis, fitness, clubhouse spaces, and multiple pools within a gated setting. Consider it if you want an active lifestyle with access to the larger Bay Isles amenities.

name: The Beaches
subtitle: Experience The Beaches, a Longboat Key Club residence offering full-service tower amenities.
shortDescription: The Beaches is a high-rise within the Longboat Key Club area, offering full-service conveniences like concierge/24-hour doorman, a heated pool and spa, fitness center, and a resident clubroom. It’s a compelling option for buyers who want beachfront luxury with staffed building services and a more “tower lifestyle” feel.

name: Regent Place
subtitle: Discover Regent Place, a beachfront Longboat Key Club condominium offering upscale coastal living.
shortDescription: Regent Place - a part of the larger Longboat Key Club - offers luxury beachfront residences with a community pool, fitness amenities, and clubhouse spaces. Consider it if you want upscale beachfront living with access to the Longboat Key Club's larger amenities.

name: Privateer
subtitle: Explore Privateer, a Longboat Key Club residence offering tennis, pool amenities, and resort living.
shortDescription: Privateer is a Gulf-front condominium within the Longboat Key Club featuring an Olympic-size pool, tennis and pickleball courts, fitness center with sauna, and clubhouse amenities. It offers a full beachfront club lifestyle within a gated resort setting.

name: Longboat Key Towers
subtitle: Discover Longboat Key Towers, a Longboat Key Club residence offering beachfront living and resort access.
shortDescription: Longboat Key Towers is a beachfront condominium within the Longboat Key Club featuring private beach access, pool amenities, fitness facilities, and secure entry. It offers condo ownership paired with the broader luxury resort environment of the club.

name: Regent Court
subtitle: Experience Regent Court, an ultra-exclusive enclave behind the Longboat Key Club gates offering rare luxury estate living.
shortDescription: Regent Court is an ultra-exclusive enclave behind the Longboat Key Club gates with a very limited number of luxury residences. It’s designed for buyers seeking maximum privacy and proximity to resort amenities.

name: Pierre
subtitle: Discover Pierre, a Longboat Key Club condominium offering tennis, pool amenities, and beachfront luxury.
shortDescription: Pierre is a Gulf-front condominium within the Longboat Key Club featuring private beach access, Har-Tru tennis courts, heated pool and spa, fitness center, and gated security. It’s a luxury beachfront residence offering club-level amenities in a boutique tower setting.

name: Inn on the Beach
subtitle: Experience Inn on the Beach, a Longboat Key Club residence offering resort services and beachfront living.
shortDescription: Inn on the Beach is a Gulf-front condominium enclave within the Longboat Key Club resort featuring beachfront pools, spa amenities, and resort services. It’s ideal for buyers seeking condo ownership with optional access to golf, tennis, dining, and spa experiences.

name: The Sanctuary
subtitle: Explore The Sanctuary, a gated Longboat Key Club enclave offering beachfront luxury.
shortDescription: The Sanctuary is a Longboat Key Club gated enclave known for layered security (manned gate access) and resort-style amenities including a beachfront pool/spa, tennis courts (Har-Tru), fitness/recreation facilities, and beachfront gathering spots like a gazebo. It’s a top contender for buyers who want high privacy + full amenities without leaving the south Longboat Key Club area.

name: L'Ambiance
subtitle: Experience L’Ambiance, a luxury Gulf-front tower offering concierge services and resort-style living.
shortDescription: L'Ambiance is a luxury Gulf-front condo community with concierge services, tennis, pools, and private beach access. Experience a resort lifestyle in L'Ambiance.

name: Corey's Landing (Bay Isles)
subtitle: Discover Corey’s Landing, a gated Bay Isles neighborhood offering bayfront and golf-course homes with pool and tennis amenities.
shortDescription: Corey’s Landing is a gated Bay Isles neighborhood of roughly 61 homes featuring a community pool and tennis, with a mix of bayfront and golf-course-oriented properties. It’s compelling for buyers who want a residential neighborhood vibe inside Bay Isles while staying close to the south-end amenities and corridors.
